headline: Google's audit delays threaten startup viability even with paying customers
body: An indie developer reported securing their first paying customer while remaining trapped in Google's lengthy audit process, highlighting friction in how emerging AI tools reach market. For healthcare AI vendors, this signals potential gatekeeping challenges when deploying applications through major cloud platforms or app ecosystems that require compliance reviews. Extended audit periods directly impact time-to-value in clinical settings where organizations need rapid vendor onboarding. Healthcare startups building on Google infrastructure should anticipate similar delays in their go-to-market timelines and factor regulatory review cycles into funding runway calculations.
